calendar.matters:
PETITIONER PAC-12 ENTERPRISES, LLC'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Jun-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER PAC-12 ENTERPRISES, LLC'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed petition to confirm the arbitration award entered on October 23, 2024 as a judgment is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Notice Of Hearing For Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER PAC-12 ENTERPRISES, LLC's Hearing For Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The court grants the unopposed motion to approve the Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment. The court finds pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 25249.7, subdivision (f)(4), that the warning required by the settlement is in compliance with Proposition 65 (Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5 to 25249.14); that the award of attorney's fees pursuant to the settlement is reasonable under California law; and that, considering the factors set out in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7, subdivision (b)(2), and the facts asserted in the moving papers, the penalty amount is reasonable. Accordingly the motion is granted and the parties may submit the proposed judgment for signature.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling, along with a proposed judgment.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
